---

<!-- GENERATED BY hg-global-skill-sync.sh FROM ~/.claude/commands/shader.md; DO NOT EDIT -->

Cycle the Ghostty terminal shader. [user-provided arguments] can be:

- `next` — advance to next shader in playlist
- `random` — pick a random shader
- `list` — show available shaders
- `set <name>` — set a specific shader by name
- `off` — disable shader
- (empty) — show current shader

Use the shader scripts in `~/dotfiles/ghostty/shaders/bin/` and update the Ghostty config at `~/.config/ghostty/config` using atomic writes (mktemp + mv pattern from CLAUDE.md).
